body:
# Release Notes — v1.18.0 ## Feature ### XYZ — Kubernetes node and workload cost breakdown You could see what a cluster costs in total, but not how that splits across the apps running in it. This adds per-workload cost for every cluster across AWS (EKS), GCP (GKE), and Azure (AKS) — which namespace and deployment is driving spend, and how much you're paying for but not using (idle/waste). These are a **breakdown of the cluster's existing VM spend, not new charges** — node cost comes from the VM's actual billed price (reservations, savings plans, spot included) and is split across workloads. So cost summaries and the cloud bill never double-count. ## Fixes ### XYZ / XYZ Day — GCP one-click onboarding no longer fails Onboarding failed for some accounts because an org-only role (`cloudidentity.groups.reader`) can't be granted at the project level, and it broke the whole grant. Onboarding now skips org-scoped roles automatically, so setup, provisioning, and "Fix permissions" all complete. Also fixes the XYZ Day permissions drawer wrongly showing "All permissions granted" for read-only + provision accounts. ## Technical details
K8s workload cost attribution - Workload cost uses a 9:1 CPU:Memory split of the node's cost; nodes are no longer costed separately and join to their backing `compute`/`ec2`/`vm` row, so the price reflects actual billing. - New `Attribution` billing class keeps workload rows out of all money totals (summary, trends, Sankey, showback, anomalies, rollup) while the K8s pages still serve them — no double-counting. - Three endpoints (cluster list, per-cluster breakdown, paginated workloads); usage/waste read from synced metrics, no live K8s calls.
GCP onboarding — skip org-scoped roles - Roles tagged `scope: organization` in the permissions catalog are filtered at the single role-binding point, covering onboarding, XYZ Day provision, and re-authorize. - XYZ Day drawer no longer filters provision permissions by the read/write tier (fixes the false "all granted").
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XYZ/XYZ/compare/v1.17.8...v1.18.0
